title: More Nonsense Limerick 9
content:
There was an old person of Bree,
    Who frequented the depths of the sea;
    She nurs'd the small fishes, 
    And washed all the dishes,
    And swam back again into Bree.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 9" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
